FrozenRule: All Yu2022 ALFALFA rows with AGC<100000 mapped to UGC, local SPARC rotmod availability, and not already in W_tau_eff enter the expansion queue.
Primary scoring candidates require S/N>=20 and no catalogue confusion note c. Lower-quality rows remain documented but are not scored in the first expansion pass.
Existing W_tau_eff seed overlaps are retained as anchors and must not be refit during the expansion pass.
No Af/Ac versus expanded W_tau_eff directional readout may be computed until the expanded scoring script and expanded score table are committed.
